changes.reason: Adds a distinct high-value Mac external display troubleshooting article backed by current Apple China Support pages; existing canonical Mac startup/DFU articles mention displays only as a branch and do not cover external display detection, resolution, refresh rate, cables, adapters, docks, or accessory permission.

queries: 外接显示器分辨率低 刷新率不对
HDMI 显示器无信号 Mac
Detect Displays Mac external monitor not detected
title summary symptoms aliases devices platforms errorMessages existing canonical Mac display HDMI resolution
canonicalReview.notes: Existing matches only route Mac startup, power, and DFU workflows where a display can be a symptom or exclusion. No canonical article covers a Mac that is otherwise working but an external monitor is black, not detected, low resolution, wrong refresh rate, dock-related, HDMI/USB-C related, or waiting for Detect Displays/accessory permission.
